outputChannelCompensations.finalMessage: OpenCode lacks a pre-emit hook for the assistant's final message; F19 routes finalMessage hits to require-review, demotable only by the operator-token-suspicious-only sentinel.
outputChannelCompensations.prText: PR text is observed post-hoc via gh-CLI invocation; suspicious-severity hits route to require-review and demotion is operator-token-suspicious-only.

negativeCapabilities.reason: F15 execution-envelope build/verify wiring has not landed for OpenCode; adapter cannot prove cwd inode, git HEAD, env diff, or resolved executable path at execution time
negativeCapabilities.evidence: opencode/hooks/adapter.js declares envelopeReporting: false; no Claude-style envelope build call in the OpenCode adapter path

negativeCapabilities.reason: Without envelope reporting the adapter cannot report a verified env delta against a baseline
negativeCapabilities.evidence: envelopeReporting: false implies env diff is not collected at hook time

negativeCapabilities.reason: OpenCode does not expose a pre-emit hook for the assistant's final message; only post-hoc observation is possible
Terminal output is observed via post-adapter but not rewritten or blocked in-line
OpenCode does not surface screenshot artifacts to hooks

compensatingRestrictions: Critical-write floors (payload-class-C, protected-branch) must rely on adapter pretool blocking + post-tool secret-scan rather than envelope re-verification until F15 wiring lands
PostToolUse output is scanned for secrets (scanSecrets) and tagged as external-source for taint tracking on every tool output
